# awsext_qconnect_ai_guardrail (Resource)

Creates and manages an Amazon Q in Connect AI Guardrail (qconnect:CreateAIGuardrail). `name` and `description` force replacement when changed. Policy configs and messaging are updatable in-place.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "awsext_qconnect_ai_guardrail" "example" {
  assistant_id              = awsext_qconnect_assistant.example.assistant_id
  name                      = "example-guardrail"
  blocked_input_messaging   = "I can't help with that."
  blocked_outputs_messaging = "I can't share that."

  content_policy_config = {
    filters_config = [
      { input_strength = "HIGH", output_strength = "HIGH", type = "SEXUAL" },
      { input_strength = "HIGH", output_strength = "HIGH", type = "VIOLENCE" },
    ]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `assistant_id` (String) Identifier of the parent Amazon Q in Connect assistant.
- `blocked_input_messaging` (String) Message returned to the user when the AI Guardrail blocks an input prompt.
- `blocked_outputs_messaging` (String) Message returned to the user when the AI Guardrail blocks a model response.
- `name` (String) Name of the AI Guardrail.

### Optional

- `content_policy_config` (Attributes) Content filter policy configuration for the AI Guardrail. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--content_policy_config))
- `contextual_grounding_policy_config` (Attributes) Contextual grounding policy configuration for the AI Guardrail. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contextual_grounding_policy_config))
- `description` (String) Description of the AI Guardrail.
- `sensitive_information_policy_config` (Attributes) Sensitive information (PII and regex) policy configuration for the AI Guardrail. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sensitive_information_policy_config))
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags to assign to the AI Guardrail.
- `topic_policy_config` (Attributes) Topic denial policy configuration for the AI Guardrail. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--topic_policy_config))
- `visibility_status` (String) Visibility status of the AI Guardrail. One of PUBLISHED or SAVED. Defaults to SAVED when omitted.
- `word_policy_config` (Attributes) Word block policy configuration for the AI Guardrail. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--word_policy_config))

### Read-Only

- `ai_guardrail_arn` (String) ARN of the AI Guardrail.
- `ai_guardrail_id` (String) Service-assigned UUID of the AI Guardrail.

<a id="nestedatt--content_policy_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `content_policy_config`

Required:

- `filters_config` (Attributes List) List of content filter configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--content_policy_config--filters_config))

<a id="nestedatt--content_policy_config--filters_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `content_policy_config.filters_config`

Required:

- `input_strength` (String) Filter strength applied to input prompts. One of NONE, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH.
- `output_strength` (String) Filter strength applied to model responses. One of NONE, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH.
- `type` (String) Content category to filter. Examples: SEXUAL, VIOLENCE, HATE, INSULTS.



<a id="nestedatt--contextual_grounding_policy_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `contextual_grounding_policy_config`

Required:

- `filters_config` (Attributes List) List of contextual grounding filter configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contextual_grounding_policy_config--filters_config))

<a id="nestedatt--contextual_grounding_policy_config--filters_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `contextual_grounding_policy_config.filters_config`

Required:

- `threshold` (Number) Threshold score (0.0–1.0) below which responses are blocked.
- `type` (String) Grounding filter type. One of GROUNDING or RELEVANCE.



<a id="nestedatt--sensitive_information_policy_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sensitive_information_policy_config`

Optional:

- `pii_entities_config` (Attributes List) List of PII entity configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sensitive_information_policy_config--pii_entities_config))
- `regexes_config` (Attributes List) List of regular expression filter configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sensitive_information_policy_config--regexes_config))

<a id="nestedatt--sensitive_information_policy_config--pii_entities_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sensitive_information_policy_config.pii_entities_config`

Required:

- `action` (String) Action when PII is detected. One of BLOCK or ANONYMIZE.
- `type` (String) PII entity type (e.g. NAME, EMAIL, US_SOCIAL_SECURITY_NUMBER).


<a id="nestedatt--sensitive_information_policy_config--regexes_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sensitive_information_policy_config.regexes_config`

Required:

- `action` (String) Action when the regex matches. One of BLOCK or ANONYMIZE.
- `name` (String) Name of the regex filter.
- `pattern` (String) Regular expression pattern.

Optional:

- `description` (String) Description of the regex filter.



<a id="nestedatt--topic_policy_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `topic_policy_config`

Required:

- `topics_config` (Attributes List) List of topic configurations to deny. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--topic_policy_config--topics_config))

<a id="nestedatt--topic_policy_config--topics_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `topic_policy_config.topics_config`

Required:

- `definition` (String) Definition of the topic to deny.
- `name` (String) Name of the topic to deny.
- `type` (String) Topic type. Currently only DENY is supported.

Optional:

- `examples` (List of String) Example prompts that belong to this topic.



<a id="nestedatt--word_policy_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `word_policy_config`

Optional:

- `managed_word_lists_config` (Attributes List) List of managed word list configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--word_policy_config--managed_word_lists_config))
- `words_config` (Attributes List) List of custom words to block. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--word_policy_config--words_config))

<a id="nestedatt--word_policy_config--managed_word_lists_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `word_policy_config.managed_word_lists_config`

Required:

- `type` (String) Managed word list type. Currently only PROFANITY is supported.


<a id="nestedatt--word_policy_config--words_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `word_policy_config.words_config`

Required:

- `text` (String) Word text to block.
